title: map_artifact
description: Cross-reference of the brief's in-scope decision themes against the target story's existing gate inventory.

themes.description: One row per recurring decision theme.

theme.description: Plain-English decision the user/agent repeatedly faced.

intents.description: Distinct mined intents exhibiting this theme.

home_room.description: Room file path that owns (or would own) this decision.

status.description: Whether a gate already covers it, the room needs one, or no room models it.

decider.description: Proposed decider kind: default-rule / LLM / human.

validator.description: The brief's validator — becomes the gate's deterministic re-check.

summary_markdown.description: Human-readable map delivered to the transport.
